heading: Authority to operate VISTA program
label: 4952 Authority to operate VISTA program
text: This part shall be administered by one of the Assistant Directors appointed pursuant to . Such Director may recruit, select, and train persons to serve in full-time volunteer programs consistent with the provisions and to carry out the purpose of this part.section 12651e(d)(1)(A) of this title
notes: Amendments1993— substituted “This part shall be administered by one of the Assistant Directors appointed pursuant to . Such Director” for “The Director”.Pub. L. 103–82section 12651e(d)(1)(A) of this title1989— struck out subsec. (a) designation before “The Director may”, struck out subsec. (b) which related to replacement of applicants who become unavailable for service, and struck out subsec. (c) which related to age quotas.Pub. L. 101–2041984—Subsec. (a). designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsecs. (b) and (c).Pub. L. 98–288
